name: Google Books
description: Search public Google Books volumes by query and retrieve full metadata for one volume by ID.

auth.hint: Create a Google Cloud API key with the Books API enabled and send it in the key query parameter.

tools.name: search_volumes
tools.description: Search public Google Books volumes by query.

params.name: q
params.description: Full-text search query; supports field prefixes such as intitle: and inauthor:.

params.name: filter
params.description: Restrict results: partial, full, free-ebooks, paid-ebooks, or ebooks.

params.name: maxResults
params.description: Number of results to return, from 0 through 40.

params.name: startIndex
params.description: Zero-based index of the first result to return, for pagination.

params.name: langRestrict
params.description: Restrict results to a language code, such as en.

params.name: printType
params.description: Restrict to all, books, or magazines.

tools.name: get_volume
tools.description: Retrieve full metadata for one Google Books volume by ID.

params.name: volumeId
params.description: Google Books volume identifier, as returned by a volume search.

params.name: projection
params.description: full for all volume fields or lite for a reduced field set.
